charts.title: ✓ Validation PASS — reproduces the paper's behaviour
charts.caption: Cells sort: dark cluster wrapped by a light monolayer
charts.simulations: Validation report card. The PASS/FAIL badge is the result of an automated acceptance test (pbg_cpm_studies.gg1993.validate) evaluated against this study's own reproduced metric time series — not a hand-set verdict. light-dark fraction falls ≥45% AND light holds >80% of the medium surface (monolayer)

charts.title: Fig 12
charts.caption: cell sorting at 0→13500 MCS.
charts.simulations: GENERATED by pbg-cpm — our own Cellular Potts simulation output. This reproduces the paper's setup (its exact contact energies, initial condition, temperature/λ and the 1 MCS = 16 sweeps convention) and is named after the paper's figure it corresponds to. It is NOT scanned, traced, or copied from the PDF, and no published data points are overlaid — every value is computed from our simulation run for this study.
charts.interpretation: Complete cell sorting: dark cells cluster internally beneath a light monolayer; heterotypic contact falls while light-medium contact rises, reproducing Figs 12-16 and Tables II-III.

charts.caption: total, medium-contact, cell-cell fractions, correlations.

charts.title: Fig 14
charts.caption: ⟨n⟩ and moments.
charts.simulations: GENERATED by pbg-cpm — our own Cellular Potts simulation output. This reproduces the paper's setup (its exact contact energies, initial condition, temperature/λ and the 1 MCS = 16 sweeps convention) and is named after the paper's figure it corresponds to. It is NOT scanned, traced, or copied from the PDF, and no published data points are overlaid — every value is computed from our simulation run for this study.
charts.interpretation: Complete cell sorting: dark cells cluster internally beneath a light monolayer; heterotypic contact falls while light-medium contact rises, reproducing Figs 12-16 and Tables II-III.

charts.title: Fig 15
charts.caption: l-d, l-M, total length vs MCS across T.
charts.simulations: GENERATED by pbg-cpm — our own Cellular Potts simulation output. This reproduces the paper's setup (its exact contact energies, initial condition, temperature/λ and the 1 MCS = 16 sweeps convention) and is named after the paper's figure it corresponds to. It is NOT scanned, traced, or copied from the PDF, and no published data points are overlaid — every value is computed from our simulation run for this study.
charts.interpretation: Complete cell sorting: dark cells cluster internally beneath a light monolayer; heterotypic contact falls while light-medium contact rises, reproducing Figs 12-16 and Tables II-III.

charts.title: Fig 16
charts.caption: total, l-d, d-M vs MCS across area constraint λ.
charts.simulations: GENERATED by pbg-cpm — our own Cellular Potts simulation output. This reproduces the paper's setup (its exact contact energies, initial condition, temperature/λ and the 1 MCS = 16 sweeps convention) and is named after the paper's figure it corresponds to. It is NOT scanned, traced, or copied from the PDF, and no published data points are overlaid — every value is computed from our simulation run for this study.
charts.interpretation: Complete cell sorting: dark cells cluster internally beneath a light monolayer; heterotypic contact falls while light-medium contact rises, reproducing Figs 12-16 and Tables II-III.

charts.title: Table II
charts.caption: bulk moments vs temperature.
charts.simulations: GENERATED by pbg-cpm — our own Cellular Potts simulation output. This reproduces the paper's setup (its exact contact energies, initial condition, temperature/λ and the 1 MCS = 16 sweeps convention) and is named after the paper's figure it corresponds to. It is NOT scanned, traced, or copied from the PDF, and no published data points are overlaid — every value is computed from our simulation run for this study.
charts.interpretation: Complete cell sorting: dark cells cluster internally beneath a light monolayer; heterotypic contact falls while light-medium contact rises, reproducing Figs 12-16 and Tables II-III.

charts.title: Table III
charts.caption: bulk moments vs λ.
charts.simulations: GENERATED by pbg-cpm — our own Cellular Potts simulation output. This reproduces the paper's setup (its exact contact energies, initial condition, temperature/λ and the 1 MCS = 16 sweeps convention) and is named after the paper's figure it corresponds to. It is NOT scanned, traced, or copied from the PDF, and no published data points are overlaid — every value is computed from our simulation run for this study.
charts.interpretation: Complete cell sorting: dark cells cluster internally beneath a light monolayer; heterotypic contact falls while light-medium contact rises, reproducing Figs 12-16 and Tables II-III.
